Assurance classes: 156 mechanized_implementation_claim, 0 bounded_check, 0 attestation_backed_lane, 0 model_only_claim, 9 hypothesis_carried_theorem. build_status: March 29, 2026: the reentry mission-ops release-closure tranche still builds cleanly on the current private tree after the shared aerospace-kit extraction and staged public-mirror tooling pass, and the staged open-core mirror now also builds from clone root on the release Apple Silicon host. Passed checks this tranche: `cargo build --workspace`; `python3 scripts/stage_ziros_public_mirror.py --out target/ziros-public-mirror`; and `cargo build --workspace` from `target/ziros-public-mirror`. The staged public mirror still emits two existing dead-code warnings in `zkf-backends/src/metal_runtime.rs`, but the prior hidden private-Metal detachment failures are closed. Historical accepted checks remain: `cargo build -p zkf-lib --example private_nbody_orbital_showcase`; `cargo build -p zkf-lib --example private_satellite_conjunction_showcase`; and `cargo build -p zkf-lib --example private_voting_commitment_pipeline`.
test_status: March 29, 2026: the reentry mission-ops release-closure tranche is green on the current tree, including explicit frozen-schema regression coverage for the live proof-bearing and governed mission-ops contracts, deterministic-oracle parity gating, public bundle leakage checks, new shared mission-ops/aerospace-kit helper tests, staged public-mirror script tests, and a clone-root staged-mirror build gate. Passed checks this tranche: `bash ./scripts/run_verus_reentry_assurance_proofs.sh`; `python3 scripts/generate_verification_status_artifacts.py --check`; `cargo test -p zkf-lib --lib app::mission_ops::tests:: -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-lib --lib app::reentry::tests:: -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-lib --lib app::reentry_ops::tests:: -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-cli reentry_assurance -- --nocapture`; `python3 -m unittest scripts.tests.test_stage_ziros_public_mirror`; `cargo test -p zkf-lib --lib --no-fail-fast`; `python3 scripts/stage_ziros_public_mirror.py --out target/ziros-public-mirror`; and `cargo build --workspace` from `target/ziros-public-mirror`. An unrelated live Compact/Halo2 integration inside the broader `cargo test -p zkf-cli -- --nocapture` sweep remained long-running and was not used as a release blocker for this scoped reentry tranche. Historical accepted checks remain: `cargo test -p zkf-lib implementation_closure_generated_outputs_match_repo_files --lib -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-lib satellite_plan_commitment_tamper_fails --lib -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-lib satellite_state_commitment_tamper_fails --lib -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-lib satellite_tampered_running_minimum_fails --lib -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-lib satellite_small_step_witness_satisfies_constraints --lib -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-core --lib`; `cargo test -p zkf-backends --lib`; `cargo test -p zkf-integration-tests --test private_nbody_orbital_showcase -- --nocapture`; `cargo test -p zkf-integration-tests --test private_satellite_conjunction_showcase -- --nocapture`; and `cargo test -p zkf-integration-tests --test private_voting_commitment_pipeline -- --nocapture`.
recent_delivery: Extended the theorem-first reentry mission-ops tranche into the first reusable aerospace-kit and staged public-mirror layer: extracted shared mission-ops boundary, artifact classification, public/private export filtering, public-export scrubbing, and deterministic-oracle release-gate helpers into `zkf-lib/src/app/mission_ops.rs`; rewired the reentry CLI/report/export path to consume those shared helpers without changing the eight frozen reentry schemas; added explicit aerospace-kit and public-monorepo-mirror docs; and hardened `scripts/stage_ziros_public_mirror.py` so the first `AnubisQuantumCipher/ziros` mirror is staged as an Apache-2.0-safe open-core CPU-first slice that rewrites hidden Metal defaults out of the included workspace and now builds from clone root instead of only looking plausible on paper.
